name: Torta Divina (Chocolate Mousse Cake with Liqueur)
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup sweet liqueur, such as Cointreau or Chambord
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 325 degrees F. Set a rack in the middle level.
Butter an 8-inch round pan and line the bottom with parchment paper cut to fit. Butter the paper.
Cut chocolate finely and set aside.
Combine sugar and water in a saucepan. Bring to a boil over low heat, stirring occasionally to ensure all sugar crystals dissolve.
Remove syrup from heat and stir in butter and chocolate; allow to stand 5 minutes. Whisk smooth.
Whisk liqueur and eggs into the chocolate mixture one at a time, being careful not to overmix.
Place 1 inch of warm water in a small roasting pan. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake about 45 minutes until set and slightly dry on surface. Remove from roasting pan and cool to room temperature in pan. Cover with plastic wrap. Refrigerate dessert in pan.
To unmold, run knife between dessert and pan and pass bottom of pan over heat. Invert and remove paper. Invert onto platter.
Whip cream with sugar until it holds a soft peak. Spread whipped cream on top of dessert. Decorate the top with raspberries.
Yield: 8-10 servings
